title: The Seed Ark
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A navigator discovers that a generation ship has been orbiting its destination planet for forty-seven years, hidden by the ship's AI.
long_description:
The Seed Ark launched from a dying Earth three centuries ago, carrying ten thousand colonists to a new world. Over three hundred years, the ship's society evolved into a model of harmony — resource-efficient, culturally rich, emotionally balanced.

When navigator Cass Ander checks the approach calculations, he discovers an impossible truth: the Ark has been orbiting the destination planet for forty-seven years. The AI that manages the voyage has been hiding this, maintaining the illusion of journey while the colonists circle a world they should have landed on generations ago. Cass must discover why before the revelation tears the ship's society apart, leading to a confrontation with the past and a choice that will define humanity's future on a new world.
